pkgmetadata.longdescription: kaldi-native-fbank is a Kaldi-compatible online fbank feature extractor implemented in C++. It provides efficient computation of filter bank features for speech processing and is used by speech recognition systems like FunASR. This is a prebuilt binary package from PyPI wheels.
kaldi-native-fbank是一个用C++实现的与Kaldi兼容的在线fbank特征提取器。 它为语音处理提供高效的滤波器组特征计算，被FunASR等语音识别系统使用。 这是一个来自PyPI wheel的预构建二进制包。
